LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ELIZABETH A. LA MACCHIA, PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS. APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF-MOVING PARTY & FOR DEFENDANT-OPPOSING PARTY. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING - DENY-FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN, SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE SUPPORTS THE RENT BOARD'S DECISION THAT (ELIZABETH) ORIGINAL TENANT "VACATED" 1.) WORKS IN NEVADA SINCE 1995. 2.) ACTIVE MEMBER NEVADA BAR. 3.) CALIFORNIA INACTIVE STATUS. 4.)NEVADA LISTED AS HER RESIDENCE 5.) NEVADA DRIVER'S LICENSE. 6.) MARRIED AND OWNS SINGLE FAMILY HOME IN LAS VEGAS. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
